summary: Tested SnapAlign flexible variant system (variant_axes + options dict). Backend: 17/17 pytest tests pass — admin product CRUD with variant_axes works, GET /api/products returns axes+variants, cart endpoints (POST/PUT/DELETE by cart_item_id) keep variant_id distinct lines and enrich response with variant object, manual UPI create-order correctly adds variant.price_modifier (verified subtotal 549*3 + 499*2 = 2645). Pre-seeded products prod_927e589bb547 (brand→model cascade, 4 variants) and prod_ffd936f15deb (3 color swatches with per-color image+swatch_hex+price_modifier 100 on red) exist. Frontend: cascading dropdowns work (Brand→Model gating, 'Select Brand first' gate, price ₹499→₹549 on Samsung S24 Ultra, Add-to-Cart toggles from disabled 'Select options to continue' to enabled 'Add to Cart'). Color swatch product renders 3 image-circle swatches; clicking Crimson Red updates main carousel media src to seed/red image, price ₹799→₹899, button enables. Legacy products (prod_tg001) still render legacy variant-selector — no regression. Admin VariantsEditor opens in Add Product dialog, presets visible (Phone Case (Color), Tempered Glass (Brand→Model)), preset application creates axis-row-0; editing prod_927e589bb547 pre-loads 2 axes + 4 variants in editor.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/server.py is 1371 lines — over the 700-line guideline; should be split into routers (cart, products, payment, admin, auth) for maintainability.

Cart legacy endpoints PUT/DELETE /api/cart/{product_id} (lines 464-477) coexist with the new /cart/item/{cart_item_id} endpoints. Legacy ones are NOT variant-safe (will modify all variant lines for the product). Recommend deprecating or guarding them once frontend is fully migrated.
POST /api/cart returns 200 with body {message} but no created cart_item_id — frontend has to GET /api/cart again to find the new line. Returning the created item would reduce a round-trip.
DELETE /api/cart/item/{id} and PUT silently succeed even when the cart_item_id does not belong to the user (no 404). Consider returning 404 for unknown ids to surface integration bugs.
test_credentials: Admin: password 'snapalign2026' (legacy, no email). Customer-side E2E used a synthetic user_sessions row inserted directly into Mongo (collection name confirmed: user_sessions, not sessions).
seed_data_creation: Test created+deleted one TEST_Variant_Product via admin API. Inserted+removed a synthetic user (user_id=u_*) and user_sessions row plus its cart/orders for the variant cart E2E.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_variants.py covers seeded variant products, admin CRUD with variant_axes, legacy regression, cart auth gates, and an authenticated cart variant E2E (subprocess-injects a session into MongoDB user_sessions collection). All 17 tests pass. Frontend selectors used: [data-testid="axis-dropdown-{key}"], [data-testid="axis-swatch-color-{value}"], [data-testid="variant-axes-selector"], [data-testid="product-price"], [data-testid="add-to-cart-detail-btn"]. Admin login flow uses password-only legacy form. To test customer cart UI in browser, you must seed a session_token cookie because Emergent OAuth is not headless-friendly.
rca of the issue: N/A — no failures found; one minor test bug (wrong Mongo collection name 'sessions' instead of 'user_sessions') was self-corrected during test authoring.
